topic: European news on deleted, controversial, or censored political speech online published in the last week
editorial_overview: The search results provided do not include enough established European news coverage that clearly matches the requested criteria. Most results are social-media posts, unrelated opinion pieces, or non-European/insufficiently verifiable items rather than news articles from established outlets about deleted posts, controversial political speech, or official pressure to remove online content. Based on the available results, there is no reliable set of relevant articles to report without inventing or extrapolating beyond the sources. A broader search across European wire services and national outlets would likely be needed to assemble a valid press review.
